en.title: Best Exosome Serums 2026
en.description: The exosome serums worth your money in 2026, ranked from medical-grade platelet formulas to under-$25 spicule picks.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳外泌體精華排行榜
zh-tw.description: 2026 值得入手的外泌體精華排行，從醫美級血小板配方到八百塊有找的微針柱平價款一次盤點。

en.description: The dermatologist favorite, built on 1+ trillion platelet-derived exosomes with gold-standard clinical studies behind it and the strongest month-one results I have seen.

zh-tw.description: 皮膚科最愛，主打超過一兆顆血小板來源外泌體，背後有正規臨床研究，連用一個月的改善幅度是我測過最猛的。

en.description: A luxury regenerative serum pairing billions of human stem cell exosomes with growth factors and peptides, and it visibly firms mature skin over a couple of months.

zh-tw.description: 奢華再生精華，把數十億顆人類幹細胞外泌體和生長因子、胜肽湊在一起，熟齡肌連用兩個月拉提感很有感。

en.description: Doctor-formulated around eXo3 exosomes plus copper tripeptide-1, a longevity play I trust for firming and tone on mature skin.

zh-tw.description: 醫師配方，以 eXo3 外泌體搭配銅胜肽，抗老拉提和膚色調理我很信任，熟齡肌看它就對了。

en.description: The everyday glow version, lighter on exosomes and heavier on hydration, ideal for pre-juvenation and daily luminosity.

zh-tw.description: 日常水光版本，外泌體濃度略低、保濕成分拉高，適合預防老化和每天養亮的膚況。

en.description: Built for post-microneedling recovery with HLA-G mesenchymal stem cell exosomes, copper peptides and ceramides that speed the skin's repair.

zh-tw.description: 為微針術後修復設計，用 HLA-G 間質幹細胞外泌體加上銅胜肽和神經醯胺，加速肌膚修復。

en.description: Delivers PTT-6 exosome signaling with 3,000+ regenerative proteins at $100, the smartest value in medical-grade post-procedure recovery.

zh-tw.description: 用 PTT-6 外泌體訊號搭配三千多種再生蛋白，一千出頭台幣就有醫美級術後修復力，性價比很高。

en.description: A daily exosome serum layering stem cell growth factors with peptides for gradual firming, aimed at consistent long-term use.

zh-tw.description: 每日型外泌體精華，把幹細胞生長因子和胜肽疊在一起做漸進拉提，主打長期穩定使用。

en.description: A spicule serum that pushes exosomes and AHA/BHA/PHA past the surface for under $25, my pick for trying exosomes without the medical-grade price.

en.description: A K-beauty spicule serum with exosomes and Centella that resurfaces pores and texture, a Watsons staple that overdelivers at its price.

zh-tw.description: 韓系微針柱精華，用外泌體加積雪草處理毛孔和膚質，屈臣氏常備款，這個價位表現超值。

en.description: The entry-point winner at $24, with 1% plant-derived Cica exosomes, Kollaren tripeptide and ectoin for a genuinely pleasant hydro finish.

zh-tw.description: 入門首選，六百多塊，含 1% 植物來源 Cica 外泌體、Kollaren 三胜肽和依克多因，水潤收尾的膚感真的舒服。

references.title: What Are Exosomes? The Viral Beauty Trend Everyone's Talking About
7 Best Exosome Serums of 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
Best Exosome Serum in 2026: Comparison, Trends, and Top Picks

en.commentary:
Exosomes are the ingredient I get asked about most this year, and after living with all ten of these on my own face I can tell you the category splits cleanly by exosome source. Plated INTENSE earns the top spot because its platelet-derived exosomes come with real clinical studies behind them, and after four weeks my texture and tone shifted more than with any peptide serum I have run. Angela Caglia Cell Forte sits right behind it, pairing human stem cell exosomes with growth factors and peptides for a luxury formula that visibly firms mature skin over a couple of months. Exoceuticals EXO ELITE rounds out my medical-grade top three, adding copper tripeptide-1 to its eXo3 exosomes for a longevity play I trust on older skin.

The value story is where this category gets interesting. Calecim Professional Serum delivers PTT-6 exosome signaling at $100 for post-procedure recovery and punches well above that price. On the budget end, the Medicube One Day Exosome Shot 7500 uses a spicule delivery system to push its actives past the surface for under $25, which makes it my pick for anyone curious about exosomes before committing $250. The INKEY List Exosome Hydro-Glow Complex takes the entry crown at $24 with 1% plant-derived Cica exosomes and a genuinely pleasant hydro finish. Match the serum to your skin goal and your budget, because every tier here has a clear winner.

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE is the exosome serum to beat
highlights.body: Plated is the #1 dermatologist-recommended exosome brand for a reason. Its platelet-derived exosomes carry gold-standard clinical studies, and in my own four-week test the shift in texture and tone outpaced every peptide serum I compared it against. If you want the strongest evidence-backed result and can spend $258, start here.

highlights.title: Human stem cell exosomes justify Angela Caglia's price
highlights.body: Cell Forte pairs billions of human stem cell exosomes with growth factors and peptides in a single hand-cultured batch. It firms visibly over two months, which is why it took a Best of Beauty award and why I rank it second overall for anyone chasing luxury regenerative results.

highlights.title: Calecim is the smartest value in medical-grade exosomes
highlights.body: At $100 the Calecim Professional Serum delivers PTT-6 signaling with over 3,000 regenerative proteins, and its gentle pH makes it my go-to for post-procedure recovery. It gives you real clinic-grade exosome science for less than half the price of the premium serums above it.

highlights.title: Medicube lets you try exosomes for under $25
highlights.body: The One Day Exosome Shot 7500 uses a spicule delivery system to drive exosomes and AHA/BHA/PHA past the surface, and at $24.90 it is the honest on-ramp to this category. It is my recommendation for anyone curious about exosomes who is not ready to spend $250 to find out if they work for their skin.

zh-tw.commentary:
外泌體大概是我今年被問最多次的成分，這十罐我自己輪流上臉用下來，老實說整個品類最關鍵的分野就在外泌體的來源。Plated INTENSE 拿下第一是實至名歸，它用的是血小板來源外泌體，背後有正經的臨床研究撐腰，我連用四週，膚質和膚色的改善幅度比我用過的任何胜肽精華都明顯。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 緊追在後，主打人類幹細胞外泌體加上生長因子和胜肽，走的是奢華路線，熟齡肌連用兩個月拉提感很有感。Exoceuticals EXO ELITE 補上醫美級前三，在 eXo3 外泌體之外加了銅胜肽，抗老配置我很信任，熟齡肌可以直接看它。

講到性價比這個品類就有意思了。Calecim Professional Serum 用 PTT-6 外泌體訊號，一千出頭台幣就有醫美級術後修復力，這個價位打得很兇。預算有限的話，Medicube 一日外泌體針 7500 用微針柱把活性成分送進角質層底下，不用八百塊台幣就能入手，想試外泌體又不想一次砸八千的人我第一個推它。The INKEY List 外泌體水光複合精華用 1% 植物來源 Cica 外泌體拿下入門王座，六百多塊，水潤收尾的膚感真的舒服。看你的膚況和預算對號入座，每個級距這裡都有贏家。

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE 是外泌體精華的標竿
highlights.body: Plated 能當上皮膚科第一推薦的外泌體品牌是有原因的。它的血小板來源外泌體有正規臨床研究背書，我自己實測四週，膚質和膚色的變化贏過我拿來對照的每一支胜肽精華。想要最有實證力的效果、預算又摸得到 NT$8,180，就從這罐開始。

highlights.title: 人類幹細胞外泌體撐得起 Angela Caglia 的價格
highlights.body: Cell Forte 把數十億顆人類幹細胞外泌體和生長因子、胜肽湊進一罐手工培養的配方裡。連用兩個月拉提很有感，這也是它拿下年度美妝獎的原因，追求奢華再生效果的人，我把它排在整體第二。

highlights.title: Calecim 是醫美級外泌體裡最聰明的性價比
highlights.body: 一千出頭台幣，Calecim Professional Serum 就給你 PTT-6 訊號加三千多種再生蛋白，溫和的酸鹼值讓它成為我術後修復的首選。用不到上面那幾支頂級精華一半的價錢，就能買到真正診所級的外泌體科學。

highlights.title: Medicube 讓你不用八百塊就能試外泌體
highlights.body: 一日外泌體針 7500 用微針柱把外泌體和 AHA/BHA/PHA 送進角質層底下，NT$890 是進入這個品類最誠實的入門磚。想試外泌體、又還沒準備好花八千塊來驗證它對自己膚況有沒有用的人，我推這罐。

references.title: The Rise of Exosome-Based Cosmeceuticals in 2026
Exosome Therapy FDA Status 2026: Zero Approvals
Luxury Skincare Serums Are Winning the 2026 Beauty Shopping Race

en.commentary: Plated Intense stays my number one, and the 2026 market data only makes the case stronger. Beauty editors this year named serums the defining skincare category, driven specifically by exosome treatments, and Plated sits at the center of that as the first human-platelet-derived exosome serum backed by years of clinical research. When I judge efficacy and visible results, that clinical grounding is what separates it from the pack, and it is why it holds the top score on the factors that matter most. I want to be clear-eyed about the category though. No exosome product is currently approved for cosmetic use by the FDA, and there are still zero approved exosome cosmetics in 2026. That is not a reason to avoid these serums, plenty of people see real results, but it is why I weight brands with published research and transparent sourcing above those leaning on marketing alone. Angela Caglia Cell Forte and Exoceuticals Exo Elite keep second and third on the strength of their supporting-actives formulas and consistent results, both worth the splurge if your budget stretches. Where I keep steering value shoppers is the Korean tier, Medicube, VT, and Inkey, which deliver a real exosome experience at a fraction of the flagship prices and earn their high value scores honestly. I made no rank changes this cycle. The science is advancing fast and the regulatory picture is still forming, so I am rewarding the serums that pair believable potency with results people can actually see, and letting price sort the rest.

highlights.title: Plated leads on clinical grounding
highlights.body: As the first human-platelet-derived exosome serum backed by years of research, Plated Intense earns its top efficacy and results scores in a year editors named exosomes the defining skincare story.

highlights.title: Know the regulatory picture
highlights.body: There are still zero FDA-approved exosome cosmetics in 2026, so I weight brands with published research and transparent sourcing above those relying on marketing claims alone.

highlights.title: Splurge tier holds firm
highlights.body: Angela Caglia Cell Forte and Exoceuticals Exo Elite keep second and third on rich supporting-actives formulas and consistent visible results, both worth it if your budget allows.

highlights.title: Korean tier for value
highlights.body: Medicube, VT, and Inkey deliver a genuine exosome experience at a fraction of flagship pricing, which is why they carry the highest value scores on the board this cycle.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated Intense 我還是放第一，2026 年的市場數據只讓這個判斷更站得住腳。今年美妝編輯把精華選為最具代表性的保養品類，背後推手就是外泌體療程，而 Plated 正好站在正中央，它是第一支人類血小板來源的外泌體精華，背後有多年臨床研究撐著。當我在評功效跟看得見的效果時，就是這個臨床底子把它跟其他產品拉開，也是它在最關鍵項目拿最高分的原因。不過這個品類我想講清楚。目前沒有任何外泌體產品拿到 FDA 化妝品核准，2026 年核准數字還是掛零。這不是叫你別碰這類精華，很多人是真的有感，但這正是為什麼我把有公開研究、來源透明的品牌，排在只靠行銷話術的品牌前面。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 跟 Exoceuticals Exo Elite 守住第二第三，靠的是輔助活性成分配方跟穩定的效果，預算夠的話這兩支都值得砸。至於預算取向的讀者，我一直往韓系這一層推，Medicube、VT、Inkey，用旗艦零頭的價格給你真正的外泌體體驗，高 CP 值分數拿得心安理得。這一輪我沒換名次。科學進步很快，法規輪廓還在成形，所以我獎勵的是那些潛力可信、效果又真的看得見的精華，剩下的就讓價格去分。

highlights.title: Plated 靠臨床底子領先
highlights.body: 身為第一支人類血小板來源、有多年研究背書的外泌體精華，Plated Intense 在編輯把外泌體選為年度代表故事的這一年，功效跟效果分數都拿到最高。

highlights.title: 先搞懂法規現況
highlights.body: 2026 年核准的外泌體化妝品還是掛零，所以我把有公開研究、來源透明的品牌，排在只靠行銷話術的前面。

highlights.title: 旗艦層站得很穩
highlights.body: Angela Caglia Cell Forte 跟 Exoceuticals Exo Elite 守住第二第三，靠的是紮實的輔助成分配方跟穩定有感的效果，預算夠就值得砸。

highlights.title: 韓系是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: Medicube、VT、Inkey 用旗艦零頭的價格給你真正的外泌體體驗，這也是它們這輪在榜上拿最高 CP 值分數的原因。

references.title: (plated) Skin Science | Regenerative Exosome Serums
Luxury Skincare Serums Are Winning the 2026 Beauty Shopping Race
Elevai Enfinity | Exosome Daily Serum

en.commentary: Plated INTENSE stays my number one this week, and the category momentum only reinforces it. Beauty editors have named serums the defining skincare category of 2026, with exosome formulas leading that wave, and INTENSE remains the reference point everyone else is measured against. It is a human-platelet-derived exosome serum backed by fifteen years of clinical research, with published results showing visibly diminished wrinkles, redness and brown spots inside six weeks. That depth of evidence is why it earns the top efficacy and results scores. Angela Caglia Cell Forte holds second on the strength of its supporting actives, a genuinely luxurious formula for anyone who wants exosomes wrapped in a full anti-aging routine. Exoceuticals Exo-Elite sits third with a well-rounded profile that balances potency and gentleness. The news worth flagging is Plated widening its lineup: the new BODY Serum brings platelet-derived exosomes to below-the-chin skin, targeting crepey texture on the neck, arms and hands. It does not change this face-serum ranking, but it tells you the brand is confident enough in the science to extend it, which matters when you are choosing where to invest. For value, the picture holds steady. Medicube Exosome Shot, VT Reedle Shot 700 and Inkey Exosome Hydro-Glow keep the bottom three not because they underperform, but because they deliver a real exosome experience at a fraction of the clinical-tier price. My advice this week is unchanged: buy Plated INTENSE if you want the most proven results, choose Cell Forte for a richer routine, and start with Medicube or Inkey if you want to test the category before committing serious money.

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE sets the benchmark
highlights.body: A human-platelet-derived serum backed by fifteen years of research, with published six-week results on wrinkles, redness and brown spots, earning the top efficacy and results scores.

highlights.title: Cell Forte wins on supporting actives
highlights.body: Angela Caglia's luxurious formula wraps exosomes in a full anti-aging routine, which keeps it in second for anyone wanting more than a single active.

highlights.title: Plated extends to body care
highlights.body: The new BODY Serum brings platelet-derived exosomes to neck, arms and hands, a sign of the brand's confidence in its science even though it does not shift the face ranking.

highlights.title: Value tier offers a real entry point
highlights.body: Medicube, VT and Inkey deliver a genuine exosome experience at a fraction of the clinical price, ideal for testing the category first.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated INTENSE 這週還是我的第一名，整個品類的氣勢也只是更鞏固它的地位。美妝編輯把精華液封為 2026 的代表性保養品類，而外泌體配方正是這波浪潮的領頭，INTENSE 到現在都是大家拿來當標準比較的那一支。它是人類血小板來源的外泌體精華，背後有十五年臨床研究，發表的數據顯示六週內明顯淡化皺紋、泛紅跟褐斑。這種證據厚度，就是它拿到最高功效跟成效分數的原因。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 靠輔助活性成分穩坐第二，配方真的很奢華，適合想把外泌體包進完整抗老流程的人。Exoceuticals Exo-Elite 排第三，效力跟溫和度平衡得很全面。值得提的新聞是 Plated 把產品線拉寬：新的 BODY Serum 把血小板外泌體帶到下巴以下的肌膚，針對脖子、手臂跟手部的皺褶感。它不會改變這份臉部精華排名，但代表品牌對這套科學有信心到願意延伸，這在你決定把錢投在哪時很重要。講到 CP 值，格局也很穩。Medicube Exosome Shot、VT Reedle Shot 700 跟 Inkey Exosome Hydro-Glow 排後三名不是因為表現差，而是它們用臨床級價格的零頭，就給你真實的外泌體體驗。這週建議沒變：要最有實證的成效就買 Plated INTENSE，想要更滋潤的流程選 Cell Forte，想先試試這個品類再決定要不要砸錢，就從 Medicube 或 Inkey 入門。

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE 是標竿
highlights.body: 人類血小板來源精華，背後十五年研究，發表的六週數據顯示淡化皺紋、泛紅跟褐斑，拿下最高功效與成效分數。

highlights.title: Cell Forte 贏在輔助成分
highlights.body: Angela Caglia 的奢華配方把外泌體包進完整抗老流程，適合想要不只單一活性成分的人，穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Plated 延伸到身體保養
highlights.body: 新的 BODY Serum 把血小板外泌體帶到脖子、手臂跟手部，代表品牌對自家科學有信心，雖然不影響臉部排名。

highlights.title: 平價層是真正的入門點
highlights.body: Medicube、VT 跟 Inkey 用臨床級價格的零頭就給你真實外泌體體驗，適合先試試這個品類。

references.title: 7 Best Exosome Serums of 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
Best Exosome Serum in 2026: Comparison, Trends, and Top Picks
Plated Exosome Serum Before and After Review

en.commentary:
Plated Intense keeps the top spot. Its platelet-derived Renewosome technology sits behind the most consistent visible-results reports I track, and this month's testing echoed that, with users noting calmer redness within a week and scars fading toward invisible around the 30-day mark. For anyone treating serious skin concerns, this is the serum I would spend on first.

Angela Caglia Cell Forte holds second on a rich supporting-actives formula that pairs well with the exosome payload, and Exoceuticals EXO Elite keeps third. Reviewers continue to name Exoceuticals a best-overall contender for its potency, so its position feels earned rather than generous.

Plated Daily stays fourth as the gentle everyday and post-procedure pick. When someone has sensitive or reactive skin, this is where I point them, because the texture and tolerability let you actually use it consistently, which is where exosome results come from.

Value at the accessible end still runs through Medicube, VT Reedle Shot, and Inkey, which give curious buyers a real taste of the category without a clinic-tier price. Nothing launched this week to reshuffle the leaders, and the serums drawing buzz are already on my board. I am holding every rank and score. In a category this hype-prone, the honest move is to reward proven results and stable formulas rather than chase a press cycle.

highlights.title: Plated Intense leads on results
highlights.body: Renewosome platelet-derived technology drives the most consistent visible-results reports, keeping it the top spend for serious concerns.

highlights.title: Strong actives hold the podium
highlights.body: Angela Caglia Cell Forte pairs a rich actives formula with its exosomes at second, and Exoceuticals EXO Elite keeps third on potency.

highlights.title: Plated Daily for sensitive skin
highlights.body: Gentle texture and tolerability make it the everyday and post-procedure pick for reactive skin that needs consistent use.

highlights.title: Accessible entry points
highlights.body: Medicube, VT Reedle Shot, and Inkey give curious buyers a real taste of exosomes without a clinic-tier price.

highlights.title: No reshuffle this week
highlights.body: The buzzed-about serums are already ranked and nothing new launched, so every rank and score holds.

zh-tw.commentary:
Plated Intense 續坐第一。它的血小板來源 Renewosome 技術，撐起我追蹤到最一致的有感回饋，這個月的實測也呼應：一週內泛紅變穩，大約 30 天疤痕淡到快看不見。皮膚有比較嚴重困擾要處理的人，這支是我會優先花錢的。

Angela Caglia Cell Forte 守第二，靠豐富的輔助活性成分跟外泌體搭得好。Exoceuticals EXO Elite 保住第三，評測持續把它列為整體最佳的候選，靠的是濃度，所以這個名次是實力掙來的，不是給面子。

Plated Daily 穩坐第四，是溫和日常跟術後修復的選擇。遇到敏感或容易泛紅的膚況，我就導向它，因為它的質地跟耐受度讓你真的能天天用，而外泌體的效果就是靠持續用出來的。

親民端的性價比還是走 Medicube、VT Reedle Shot 跟 Inkey，讓好奇的人用不到診所級的價格先嚐嚐這個類別。這禮拜沒有新品打亂前段，現在在紅的那幾支本來就在我榜上。名次跟分數全留。這種很容易被話題帶著跑的類別，誠實的做法是獎勵有實證、配方穩定的產品，不追新聞熱度。

highlights.title: Plated Intense 靠效果領先
highlights.body: Renewosome 血小板技術帶出最一致的有感回饋，是嚴重困擾優先花錢的首選。

highlights.title: 強活性成分守前段
highlights.body: Angela Caglia Cell Forte 靠豐富活性成分配外泌體排第二，Exoceuticals EXO Elite 靠濃度守第三。

highlights.title: Plated Daily 給敏感肌

references.title: Best Exosome Serum in 2026: Comparison, Trends, and Top Picks
7 Best Exosome Serums of 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
Is this viral skincare ingredient the secret to youthful skin? Derms weigh in

en.commentary: Plated Intense holds my number one because it is the serum with the clearest clinical backing and the most consistent real-world payoff. The platelet-derived exosome technology behind it is the most potent I have tested, and the four-week fine-line results people report line up with what I see on my own skin. It is expensive, and I still think it is the one to beat. Angela Caglia Cell Forte stays second on the strength of its supporting actives, a genuinely luxurious formula that pairs exosomes with growth factors for a plumping effect I trust for mature skin. Exoceuticals Exo Elite holds third as the balanced clinical pick. This week the derm coverage keeps circling the same honest caveat, that no exosome product is FDA-approved for cosmetic use yet, so I weight visible results and gentleness heavily rather than marketing claims. Plated also picked up a NewBeauty Award this year, which reinforces the top of my board rather than reshuffling it. On the value end, the Medicube Exosome Shot, VT Reedle Shot 700, and Inkey Exosome Hydro Glow remain the trio I point budget shoppers toward, since they deliver a real fraction of the flagship experience for a small fraction of the cost. I made no ranking changes today because the science and the products have not moved in seven days, only the conversation around them. If your skin is sensitive, start with Plated Daily at rank four, since its gentleness score is the highest near the top.

highlights.title: Plated Intense leads on evidence
highlights.body: The platelet-derived exosome tech is the most potent I have tested, and the four-week fine-line results hold up.

highlights.title: Cell Forte for mature skin
highlights.body: Exosomes paired with growth factors give a plumping effect I trust, which keeps it second.

highlights.title: Value trio still stands
highlights.body: Medicube, VT, and Inkey deliver a real slice of the flagship experience for a fraction of the price.

highlights.title: Regulation caveat matters
highlights.body: No exosome serum is FDA-approved for cosmetics yet, so I weight visible results and gentleness over claims.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated Intense 這次穩坐第一，因為它是臨床背書最清楚、實際回饋也最穩定的一支。背後那套血小板萃取的外泌體技術是我測過濃度最高的，網友回報四週淡化細紋的效果，跟我自己臉上看到的差不多。它是真的貴，但我還是覺得它是那個要被超越的標竿。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 靠支援型活性成分穩住第二，配方真的很奢華，外泌體搭生長因子，那種撐起來的飽滿感,熟齡肌我很放心。Exoceuticals Exo Elite 排第三，是均衡的臨床派選擇。這禮拜皮膚科的報導又繞回同一個誠實的提醒,目前沒有任何外泌體產品通過 FDA 化妝品核准,所以我把可見效果跟溫和度看得比行銷話術重。Plated 今年還拿了 NewBeauty Award，這只是再次鞏固榜首，不會讓我重排。價格帶這邊，Medicube Exosome Shot、VT Reedle Shot 700 跟 Inkey Exosome Hydro Glow 依舊是我推給預算族的三支，花小錢就能拿到旗艦的一部分體驗。今天沒動排名，因為七天內科學跟產品都沒變，變的只有討論的熱度。敏感肌的話，先從排第四的 Plated Daily 下手，它在前段班裡溫和度分數最高。

highlights.title: Plated Intense 證據最硬
highlights.body: 血小板萃取外泌體是我測過濃度最高的，四週淡化細紋的效果站得住腳。

Revolutionizing Skincare with Exosomes

en.commentary: Plated INTENSE keeps the top spot, and the coverage this week reinforces why the whole category is having a moment. Exosome serums are being called the defining skincare trend of 2026, and INTENSE is the serum I keep reaching for when someone wants the strongest at-home option. Its Renewosome technology packs a high concentration of exosomes, and the clinical claims of reduced wrinkles, redness, and brown spots within six weeks line up with what I see on real skin. The efficacy and visible-results scores stay at the top of this field for a reason. Angela Caglia Cell Forte holds a firm second, and the buzz around it is loud right now. Its SignalSource system delivers billions of exosomes alongside growth factors and cytokines, and the supporting-actives blend is the most sophisticated in this ranking. It is a splurge, and the value score reflects that, but the formula earns the praise it is getting. ExoCeuticals Exo Elite stays third as the balanced clinical pick, pairing potent sourcing with a formula that plays well on most skin. Plated Daily remains my choice for sensitive, reactive skin thanks to its gentle texture and high tolerance scores. At the accessible end, the Medicube, VT, and Inkey options keep their spots by putting exosome skincare within reach for far less money, and they are a genuine entry point for anyone curious about the trend without the flagship price.

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE leads on results
highlights.body: Its Renewosome technology delivers a high exosome concentration with clinical claims of smoother, clearer skin within six weeks. The efficacy and visible-results scores stay top of the field.

highlights.title: Angela Caglia Cell Forte is the buzz pick
highlights.body: The SignalSource system delivers billions of exosomes plus growth factors and cytokines, and it holds the highest supporting-actives score here. It is a splurge that earns its reputation.

highlights.title: ExoCeuticals is the balanced clinical choice
highlights.body: Exo Elite pairs potent sourcing with a formula that suits most skin types. It sits third as the serum I recommend when someone wants clinical strength without a specific skin concern.

highlights.title: Plated Daily suits sensitive skin
highlights.body: Its gentle texture and high tolerance scores make it my pick for reactive complexions. You get real exosome benefits in a formula built to keep calm skin calm.

highlights.title: Accessible tier opens the door
highlights.body: Medicube, VT, and Inkey post the top value scores and bring exosome skincare within reach for far less. They are a genuine entry point into the 2026 trend.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated INTENSE 繼續坐第一，這週的報導也再次說明整個類別為什麼正紅。外泌體精華被喊成 2026 年的定義級保養趨勢，而 INTENSE 就是有人想要最強居家選項時，我一直拿出來的那瓶。它的 Renewosome 技術塞進高濃度的外泌體，臨床宣稱六週內改善細紋、泛紅跟斑點，跟我在真實膚況上看到的對得起來。功效跟可見成效這兩項分數穩坐全場頂端，是有原因的。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 穩穩第二，現在聲量很大。它的 SignalSource 系統送進數十億外泌體，還搭配生長因子跟細胞激素，輔助活性成分的配方是這份榜單裡最講究的。它是砸錢貨，性價比分數也反映了這點，不過配方確實撐得起現在的好評。ExoCeuticals Exo Elite 守住第三的均衡臨床位，強效來源配上大多數膚質都合拍的配方。Plated Daily 依然是我給敏感、易反應肌的選擇，溫和的質地跟高耐受分數是它的強項。親民這一端，Medicube、VT、Inkey 靠著用少很多的錢把外泌體保養帶到手邊守住位置，想試試這個趨勢又不想砸旗艦價的人，它們是很實在的入門磚。

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE 成效領先
highlights.body: Renewosome 技術帶來高濃度外泌體，臨床宣稱六週內肌膚更平滑透亮。功效跟可見成效分數穩坐全場頂端。

highlights.title: Angela Caglia Cell Forte 話題度最高
highlights.body: SignalSource 系統送進數十億外泌體加上生長因子跟細胞激素，輔助活性成分分數是這裡最高的。是砸錢貨，但撐得起它的名聲。

highlights.title: Plated Daily 適合敏感肌
highlights.body: 溫和的質地跟高耐受分數，讓它成為我給易反應膚質的首選。你拿到真正的外泌體好處，配方又專門設計來讓穩定的肌膚維持穩定。

highlights.title: 親民這層打開入門大門
highlights.body: Medicube、VT、Inkey 拿下最高性價比分數，用少很多的錢把外泌體保養帶到手邊。想試 2026 趨勢的人，它們是很實在的入門磚。

references.title: Is this viral skincare ingredient the secret to youthful, glowing skin? Derms weigh in
(plated) INTENSE Serum: Advanced Skin Renewal
Best Exosome Serum: Plated vs Exoceuticals

en.commentary: Plated Intense stays my number one exosome serum, and the momentum behind it is only building. Coverage this month frames 2026 as the year of the exosome, and Plated sits at the center of it as the first human-platelet-derived exosome serum, backed by fifteen years of clinical research. Reviewers keep reporting reduced redness and visibly calmer skin within about six weeks, which lines up with its 9.6 efficacy and 9.5 results scores. Worth noting, Plated is expanding the line with a new Body Serum launching online this July, a sign the brand is scaling its formula into new use cases. That does not change the facial ranking, but it tells me the platform is healthy. Angela Caglia Cell Forte holds second as the luxury pick with a rich supporting-actives formula, and Exoceuticals Exo Elite stays third as the clinical-leaning option that dermatology offices keep reaching for. Plated Daily remains my gentle everyday choice at fourth, since its lighter texture layers well under sunscreen. For readers who want exosome benefits without the clinical price, Medicube and VT still deliver real value further down the list. My core advice holds: exosomes reward consistency, so pick a serum you will apply nightly and give it a full six week cycle before you judge the results.

highlights.title: Plated Intense leads the exosome wave
highlights.body: As the first human-platelet-derived exosome serum with fifteen years of research behind it, it keeps my top spot as 2026 becomes the year of the exosome.

highlights.title: Six week results back the score
highlights.body: Reviewers keep reporting calmer, less red skin within about six weeks, which supports its 9.6 efficacy and 9.5 results marks.

highlights.title: Plated expands with a Body Serum
highlights.body: A new Body Serum launching online this July shows the brand scaling its formula into new uses, a healthy sign even though it does not change the facial ranking.

highlights.title: Angela Caglia is the luxury pick
highlights.body: A rich supporting-actives formula and strong results keep Cell Forte at number two for readers who want a premium treatment.

highlights.title: Consistency is the real active
highlights.body: Exosomes reward nightly use, so choose a serum you will actually apply daily and give it a full six week cycle before judging.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated Intense 這週還是我的外泌體精華第一名，而且它的聲勢還在往上衝。這個月的報導把 2026 講成外泌體之年，Plated 正好站在中心，它是第一款人類血小板來源的外泌體精華，背後有十五年的臨床研究。評測一直回報大概六週內泛紅減少、膚況明顯變穩，這跟它 9.6 的功效分跟 9.5 的效果分很吻合。值得一提，Plated 這個七月要在線上推新的 Body Serum，把配方擴展到身體保養，代表這個品牌正在把技術往新場景放。這不影響臉部精華的排名，但告訴我這個平台體質很健康。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 守第二，走奢華路線，輔助活性成分很豐富。Exoceuticals Exo Elite 第三，偏臨床取向，很多皮膚科診所都愛用。Plated Daily 還是我的溫和日常款，排第四，質地比較輕，疊在防曬底下很順。想要外泌體效果又不想花診所價的，Medicube 跟 VT 在榜單後段還是很有 CP 值。我的核心建議不變，外泌體吃的是持續，挑一款你每晚願意擦的，給它完整六週再來評斷效果。

highlights.title: Plated Intense 領軍外泌體浪潮
highlights.body: 第一款人類血小板來源外泌體精華，背後十五年研究，在 2026 這個外泌體之年穩坐第一。

highlights.title: 六週見效撐住分數
highlights.body: 評測一直回報大概六週內膚況變穩、泛紅減少，支撐它 9.6 功效跟 9.5 效果的分數。

highlights.title: Plated 推出 Body Serum
highlights.body: 這七月線上推新的身體精華，把配方擴展到新場景，雖然不影響臉部排名，但看得出品牌體質健康。

highlights.title: Angela Caglia 走奢華路線
highlights.body: 輔助活性成分豐富、效果扎實，Cell Forte 穩守第二，適合想要高階療程的人。

highlights.title: 持續才是真正的活性成分
highlights.body: 外泌體吃的是每晚持續，挑一款你願意天天擦的，給它完整六週再評斷。

references.title: 7 Best Exosome Serums of 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
Best Exosome Serum: Plated vs Exoceuticals
Best Exosome Serum in 2026: Comparison, Trends, and Top Picks

en.commentary: Plated INTENSE keeps my top spot because it is the most concentrated platelet-derived exosome formula I have used, and it shows on mature skin, stubborn pigmentation, and dullness. The Renewosome technology is backed by physician-scientist research and gold-standard clinical studies, and in real use I saw redness and texture improve within a couple of weeks. If you want the strongest results and can invest, this is the one. Angela Caglia Cell Forte holds number two on the strength of its supporting actives and a texture that layers beautifully under moisturizer. Exoceuticals EXO Elite stays at number three, and fresh 2026 coverage keeps it in the elite conversation for potency and formula. Plated Daily remains my pick for daily, post-procedure, and sensitive skin because its gentler concentration plus extra hydrators make it the easiest to tolerate every morning. For value shoppers, the Medicube Exosome Shot and VT Reedle Shot deliver an accessible entry point, which is why their value scores lead the field. Nothing shifted this week, so the order holds. What I keep telling people is that exosome serums reward consistency over intensity. Most clinical participants reported visible change after about six weeks, so the serum you actually use every day beats the strongest one sitting in your cabinet. Match concentration to your skin's tolerance, layer it under sunscreen, and give it a full cycle before you judge.

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE for the strongest results
highlights.body: The most concentrated platelet-derived formula I have tested, with visible redness and texture gains inside a couple of weeks.

highlights.title: Plated Daily for sensitive skin
highlights.body: A gentler concentration with extra hydrators makes it the easiest exosome serum to tolerate every single morning.

highlights.title: Medicube and VT lead on value
highlights.body: Both offer an accessible entry into exosome skincare, which is why they top the field on value scoring.

highlights.title: Consistency beats intensity
highlights.body: Clinical change showed up around six weeks. The serum you use daily beats the strongest one sitting unused in your cabinet.

zh-tw.commentary: Plated INTENSE 這週還是我的第一,它是我用過濃度最高的血小板外泌體配方,在熟齡肌、頑固色素跟暗沉這幾塊特別看得出效果。Renewosome 技術有醫師科學家的研究跟高標準臨床背書,實際用下來,我泛紅跟膚質大概兩週就有改善。想要最強效果、預算也夠的,就選它。Angela Caglia Cell Forte 排第二,靠的是它的輔助活性成分,還有那個疊在乳液底下超服貼的質地。Exoceuticals EXO Elite 穩在第三,2026 年的評測一直把它留在效力跟配方的頂級討論裡。Plated Daily 還是我給日常、術後跟敏感肌的口袋名單,濃度溫和一點、又多加保濕,每天早上都好上手。想要 CP 值的,Medicube 外泌體針跟 VT Reedle Shot 是很好入門的價位,所以它們的 CP 值分數領先全場。這禮拜沒變動,名單維持。我一直跟大家講,外泌體精華是獎勵持之以恆,不是獎勵猛。多數臨床受試者大概六週才看到明顯變化,所以你每天真的會擦的那瓶,贏過放在櫃子裡最強的那瓶。濃度配合你的膚況、疊在防曬底下、給它擦完一個完整週期再來評斷。

highlights.title: Plated INTENSE 要最強效果
highlights.body: 我測過濃度最高的血小板外泌體配方,泛紅跟膚質大概兩週就有感。

highlights.title: Plated Daily 給敏感肌
highlights.body: 濃度溫和、又多加保濕,是每天早上最好上手的外泌體精華。

highlights.title: Medicube 跟 VT 主打 CP 值
highlights.body: 兩瓶都是入門外泌體保養很親切的價位,所以 CP 值分數領先全場。

highlights.title: 持續勝過猛
highlights.body: 臨床大概六週才看到變化。每天會擦的那瓶,贏過放櫃子裡最強卻沒在用的那瓶。
